questionHtml:
What is the enthalpy change, in kJ, of the following reaction?

3H2 (g) + N2 (g) ⇌ 2NH3 (g)

A. (6 × 391) − [(3 × 436) + 945]

B. (3 × 391) − (436 + 945)

C. −[(3 × 436) + 945] + (3 × 391)

D. −(6 × 391) + [(3 × 436) + 945]
